tasks.title: Batch27 web residual triage and patch
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: inspect current routed web surfaces on current HEAD, fix only current reproducible UX/state defects in Discover/community/artist/registrar/onboarding, and publish exact before-after evidence. If no reproducible defect exists, record a no-defect handoff instead of inventing work.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck

tasks.title: Batch27 web auth and identity regression lock
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: tighten focused regression coverage for auth-state clarity and full community-identity rendering on touched web routes only, based on current reproduced behavior or current no-defect evidence.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web test -- discovery-query-state.test.ts discovery-client.test.ts communities-client.test.ts plot-ux-regression-lock.test.ts && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck

tasks.title: Batch27 API/runtime residual triage and patch
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: inspect current API/runtime behavior behind Discover/onboarding/tracks/artist-band flows, fix only current reproducible defects on current HEAD, and publish exact runtime evidence. If no reproducible defect exists, publish a no-defect runtime handoff instead.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.title: Batch27 discovery and track contract replay
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: replay the implemented Discover/tracks runtime contracts with focused API tests and patch only evidence-backed regressions. Preserve the existing POST /tracks support contract and current discovery read/write auth boundaries.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api test -- communities.discovery.controller.test.ts communities.discovery.service.test.ts tracks.engagement.service.test.ts artist-bands.service.test.ts artist-bands.controller.test.ts && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.title: Batch27 onboarding to discover continuity replay
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: verify onboarding to Plot/Discover continuity on current HEAD, patch only deterministic state-ownership defects if they still reproduce, and publish exact route-to-route evidence.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck

tasks.title: Batch27 discover destination continuity replay
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: verify Discover to community/artist/song destination continuity on current HEAD, patch only reproduced continuity defects, and record exact route/entry evidence. If flows are clean, publish a no-defect continuity handoff.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck

tasks.title: Batch27 regression evidence command pack
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: standardize the exact verification command set for Batch27 closeout, capture it in a dated handoff, and patch only verification-documentation drift needed to keep the closeout reproducible.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.title: Batch27 residual bugfix regression lock
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: add or tighten focused regression tests for any residual bugfixes actually made in Batch27. If no residual bugfixes were needed, publish a no-op regression note instead of broadening test scope.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter api typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck

tasks.title: Batch27 fresh current-HEAD QA sweep
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: run a fresh live QA sweep on current HEAD across Discover, artist, community, registrar, plot, users, and onboarding; discard stale findings; report only current reproducible defects with exact evidence.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck

tasks.title: Batch27 merge-readiness closeout memo
tasks.prompt: Execute one MVP slice only: produce the final Batch27 closeout memo summarizing current reproducible-defect status, exact verification commands run, residual risks, and merge/readiness recommendation for the branch.
tasks.verifyCommand: pnpm run docs:lint && pnpm run infra-policy-check && pnpm --filter web typecheck && pnpm --filter api typecheck
